embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

embeds.description:
🟢 **All Systems Operational**

Shared DM queue between both bots. Every outgoing DM from any cog is intercepted and inserted into a shared SQLite database. A coordinator loop assigns each DM to whichever bot has capacity, enabling automatic load balancing. The worker loop on each bot picks up its assigned DMs and delivers them.

📋 `dm_shared_queue.db` • Bots online: **2/2** • Refreshes every 30s

before.content:
🔄 Retrying DMs for queue code **t**...

• **Role IDs detected:** 1 (cannot DM roles)
• **Rate limiting:** 3s between DMs, 20m pause after every 5 DMs

after.content:
✅ Retry completed for queue code **t**!
• **Successful DMs:** 0
• **Failed DMs:** 1

⚠️ **All DMs failed!**
• **Role IDs detected:** 1 (cannot DM roles)
• **Solution:** Remove role IDs from queue entry using `-z addmap` edit

**Options:**
• Click **🔄 Retry Failed DMs** to try again
• Click **🗑️ Delete Queue Entry** to remove this queue
